channel.title: activedirectory on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose
channel.description: Recent content in activedirectory on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose

item.title: Neo4J CMDB pt2 - Active Directory Export
item.description:
This is the second post in a series on creating a graph database CMDB.

In this post we will export data from Microsoft Active Directory to use in the Neo4J CMDB. In a tradational on-premises Windows enterprise, there is usually a goldmine of information in AD.
In a later post we will import the data into Neo4J and link it to the device information from MEMCM that we exported in Part 1.

Part 1: Exporting data from MEMCM (SCCM)
Part 2: This article

item.title: Find a computer's Active Directory Site and Subnet with PowerShell
item.description: Read-on for a PowerShell command to get the Active Directory Subnet and Site from the computername or IP Address.

item.title: Active Directory ADSystemInfo with PowerShell
item.description: ADSystemInfo is a built-in COM object in Windows 7, 8.1 and 10 that simplifies lookup of Active Directory user and computer information.

item.title: Get direct and nested Active Directory group membership with PowerShell
item.description: This post lists various methods to get all the groups a Windows user is a member of (direct and through group nesting)
